release_notes: V14.39 build 183 WiFi/Nightscout recovery patch: improves ESP32 WiFi stability by avoiding setup-mode fallback during DHCP wait, only treating WiFi as usable when a valid IP address is present, delaying Nightscout HTTPS calls after reconnect until DHCP/DNS/TLS settle, adding fast post-reconnect Nightscout retry, and improving status messages for DHCP, No IP and setup AP states.
